landing.heroTitle: Choose your sport and dive into its universe.
landing.heroDescription: The root domain is intentionally simple—pick the color that matches your sport to jump into the Supabase-powered experience.
landing.sportSectionDescription: Each button links to the `/[sport]` route with a locale prefix (e.g., /en/badminton), mirroring the real subdomains.
landing.contactPrompt: Need a new sport or partnership? hello@racketthailand.com

sport.emptyDescription: Make sure the `sports` table has a row whose `code` matches this route and that SUPABASE_URL / SERVICE_ROLE_KEY are configured.
sport.featureEmpty: This module will populate automatically as soon as Supabase rows exist for this sport.
